name: Hook Validation Tests
theme: Tests for on-generator-stop.sh, on-evaluator-stop.sh, and on-stop.sh exit codes and error messages

criteria.description: meta-tests/test-hooks.bats exists, is a valid bats file, and loads the test helper via 'load helpers/test-helper'
testSteps: Verify meta-tests/test-hooks.bats exists and is non-empty
Verify it starts with #!/usr/bin/env bats shebang
Verify it contains "load 'helpers/test-helper'" or equivalent

criteria.description: All tests in test-hooks.bats pass when run via 'bats meta-tests/test-hooks.bats'
testSteps: Run: bats meta-tests/test-hooks.bats
Verify exit code is 0
Verify no tests show as 'not ok'

criteria.description: The full meta-tests suite still passes (no regressions): 'bash meta-tests/run.sh' exits 0
testSteps: Run: bash meta-tests/run.sh
Verify exit code is 0

criteria.description: test-hooks.bats contains at least 20 @test blocks covering all 3 hook scripts
testSteps: Count lines matching '@test ' in test-hooks.bats
Verify count >= 20

criteria.description: Test: on-generator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when no active sprint directory exists
testSteps: Verify a @test exists that runs on-generator-stop.sh with no sprint directories under harness-state/sprints/
Verify the test asserts exit code 0

criteria.description: Test: on-generator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when status is 'ready-for-eval' and generator-log.md exists
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status-ready-for-eval.json and generator-log.md
Verify the test asserts on-generator-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Test: on-generator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when status is 'blocked'
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status 'blocked'
Verify the test asserts on-generator-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Test: on-generator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when status is 'active'
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status 'active'
Verify the test asserts on-generator-stop.sh exits 2
Verify the test checks stderr contains a message about status not being ready-for-eval

criteria.description: Test: on-generator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when status is 'ready-for-eval' but generator-log.md is missing
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status 'ready-for-eval' but no generator-log.md file
Verify the test asserts on-generator-stop.sh exits 2
Verify the test checks stderr mentions missing generator-log.md

criteria.description: Test: on-generator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) during contract negotiation phase (contract-proposal.json exists, contract.json does not)
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with contract-proposal.json but no contract.json and no status.json
Verify the test asserts on-generator-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Test: on-generator-stop.sh correctly finds sprint in fix-* or refactor-* directories
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a fix-* or refactor-* directory with an active status
Verify on-generator-stop.sh detects the directory and applies validation (exit 2 for active status)

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when no sprint is being evaluated (no ready-for-eval status, no contract negotiation)
testSteps: Verify a @test runs on-evaluator-stop.sh with no sprint directories or only terminal-status sprints
Verify the test asserts exit code 0

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when eval-report.json exists with valid overallResult and criteriaResults
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status 'ready-for-eval' and installs eval-report-pass.json as eval-report.json
Verify the test also installs a matching contract.json
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when eval-report.json is missing
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status 'ready-for-eval' but no eval-report.json
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 2
Verify stderr mentions missing eval-report.json

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when overallResult field is missing from eval-report.json
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status 'ready-for-eval' and an eval-report.json missing overallResult (e.g. eval-report-malformed.json)
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 2
Verify stderr mentions missing overallResult

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when criteriaResults field is missing from eval-report.json
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with status 'ready-for-eval' and an eval-report.json missing criteriaResults
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 2

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when criteria count in eval report is less than contract criteria count
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint with contract-3criteria.json (3 criteria) and an eval report with only 1-2 criteriaResults
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 2
Verify stderr mentions the criteria count mismatch

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when criteria count in eval report >= contract criteria count
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint with contract-3criteria.json and eval-report-pass.json (3 criteriaResults)
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh allows (exit 0) for valid contract review with decision field present
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with contract-proposal.json and contract-review-accepted.json (has decision field) but no contract.json
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) during contract review when contract-review.json is missing
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint directory with contract-proposal.json but no contract.json and no contract-review.json
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 2
Verify stderr mentions missing contract-review.json

criteria.description: Test: on-evaluator-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) during contract review when decision field is missing from contract-review.json
testSteps: Verify a @test creates a sprint with contract-proposal.json and contract-review-no-decision.json (missing decision field) but no contract.json
Verify the test asserts on-evaluator-stop.sh exits 2
Verify stderr mentions missing decision field

criteria.description: Test: on-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when no sprint-plan.json exists (not a harness session)
testSteps: Verify a @test runs on-stop.sh with no sprint-plan.json in harness-state/
Verify the test asserts exit code 0

criteria.description: Test: on-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when all sprints have terminal status (pass or fail)
testSteps: Verify a @test creates sprint-plan.json and sprint directories with status 'pass'
Verify the test asserts on-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Test: on-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when any sprint has status 'active'
testSteps: Verify a @test creates sprint-plan.json and a sprint directory with status 'active'
Verify the test asserts on-stop.sh exits 2
Verify stderr mentions the sprint is still active

criteria.description: Test: on-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when any sprint has status 'negotiating'
testSteps: Verify a @test creates sprint-plan.json and a sprint directory with status 'negotiating'
Verify the test asserts on-stop.sh exits 2

criteria.description: Test: on-stop.sh blocks (exit 2) when any sprint has status 'ready-for-eval'
testSteps: Verify a @test creates sprint-plan.json and a sprint directory with status 'ready-for-eval'
Verify the test asserts on-stop.sh exits 2
Verify stderr mentions the sprint is ready for evaluation

criteria.description: Test: on-stop.sh allows (exit 0) when sprint directories exist but have no status.json files
testSteps: Verify a @test creates sprint-plan.json and sprint directories with no status.json inside them
Verify the test asserts on-stop.sh exits 0

criteria.description: Every @test in test-hooks.bats works in the test temp directory with HARNESS_STATE set -- no test modifies the real harness-state/
testSteps: Verify tests use install_fixture or create files in the temp directory (via $HARNESS_STATE or $TEST_TEMP_DIR)
Verify no test writes to the project's actual harness-state/ directory
Verify hooks are executed with the working directory set to the temp dir so they read from the temp harness-state/

criteria.description: Test names follow the 'hook_name: behavior description' convention (e.g., 'on-generator-stop: allows when status is blocked')
testSteps: Inspect all @test names in test-hooks.bats
Verify each follows 'on-generator-stop:', 'on-evaluator-stop:', or 'on-stop:' prefix with descriptive behavior
criteria.threshold: All test names follow the convention

criteria.description: Tests that assert exit code 2 (block) also verify a meaningful error message is present in stderr output
testSteps: Inspect all @test blocks that assert exit code 2
Verify each also checks the output (stderr captured via run_hook or equivalent) contains a relevant substring
criteria.threshold: All blocking tests verify error messages

outOfScope: Tests for functions in utils.sh (covered in sprints 2 and 3)
Tests for functions in git.sh (covered in sprint 4)
Edge case tests beyond the core validation paths documented in the hook scripts (covered in sprint 6)
Testing the git commit convention warning in on-generator-stop.sh (non-blocking, warning only)
Modifying the test helper or existing fixtures -- use existing infrastructure from sprint 1
Testing hooks with real Claude invocations or network calls
